title: ICICI Lombard is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: ICICI Lombard is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, ICICI Lombard in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Lombard:
ICICI Lombard is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Lombard!
